name: UTAH MEDICAL PRODUCTS INC
summary: Utah Medical Products, Inc. (UTMD) designs, manufactures, and markets high-quality medical devices focused on labor and delivery, neonatal intensive care, and women's health. Key products include INTRAN PLUS intrauterine pressure catheters, TENDER TOUCH vacuum-assisted delivery cups, Filshie Clip System for sterilization, and neonatal care devices. UTMD sells directly to hospitals and clinics in the US, UK, Ireland, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and France, and through approximately 200 international distributors.

products.name: INTRAN PLUS
products.description: Disposable intrauterine pressure catheter with transducer tip for fetal monitoring during labor

products.name: TENDER TOUCH
products.description: Bell-shaped soft silicone vacuum cup for vacuum-assisted operative vaginal deliveries

products.name: BT-Cath
products.description: Uterine balloon tamponade catheter for controlling severe postpartum hemorrhage

products.name: CVX-Ripe
products.description: Dual-balloon silicone catheter for mechanical cervical ripening to facilitate labor induction

products.name: Disposa-Hood
products.description: Disposable infant respiratory hood for oxygen administration in the NICU

products.name: Filshie Clip System
products.description: Female sterilization device distributed exclusively in the US by UTMD

products.name: CORDGUARD
products.description: Device for clamping, severing umbilical cord and collecting cord blood in a closed system

products.name: AROM-COT
products.description: Finger cover with prong for rupturing maternal membranes with reduced patient discomfort

products.name: MUC-X
products.description: Aspiration device used after birth to clear neonatal respiratory passages

products.name: Abcorp Toco Belts
products.description: Latex-free tocodynamometer belts and straps for external fetal monitoring, including bariatric versions

products.name: Bari-Belts/Bari-Bands
products.description: Abdominal belts and bands designed for bariatric and various body-size patients during fetal monitoring

partnerships.description: UTMD acquired remaining life of Femcare's exclusive U.S. distribution agreement for Filshie Clip System from CooperSurgical in 2019
